security_review.trust_boundary_consistency: Uniform: single assertDocWriteAccess seam, shared oracle-parity 404 (PAGE_NOT_FOUND_MESSAGE), breadcrumb chain truncation on first gated ancestor, diff size cap before O(m*n) allocation.
